# Test Skill (subdir layout)

![CI](https://github.com/test/valid-skill-subdir/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)
![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/test/valid-skill-subdir)
![Agent Skills](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent%20Skills-compatible-blue)

A test skill demonstrating the canonical skill/ subdirectory layout.

## Installation

```bash
npx skills add test/valid-skill-subdir
```

## Usage

After installing the skill, try these prompts with your agent:

- `Run test skill`

### CLI usage

You can also run the script directly:

```bash
test-skill run
```
